hero.title: Earthquake Preparation Store
hero.subtitle: Prepare today for a safer tomorrow. High-quality certified emergency preparedness kits backed by Earthquake Technologies.

footer.affiliateLabel: An Affiliate of the Girişimci Türk Ecosystem
footer.affiliateNote: depremTek Market is the official e-commerce affiliate of the Earthquake Technologies project under Girişimci Türk, turning engineering solutions into accessible disaster-preparedness products for everyone.

homeFeatures.heading: Disaster Preparedness Under depremTek Engineering
homeFeatures.subheading: Being ready save lives. Our products are engineered and selected for the extreme environments of emergency situations.
homeFeatures.card1Desc: Products vetted by Earthquake Technologies engineers for structural and life safety standards.
homeFeatures.card2Desc: For immediate readiness, your orders are packed securely and dispatched within 24-48 hours.
homeFeatures.card3Desc: Equipment that complies with disaster relief regulations and has passed rigorous stress tests.
homeFeatures.card4Desc: Advisory services for both personal prep and bulk institutional disaster readiness planning.

homeCorporate.heading: SURVIVING THE ISTANBUL EARTHQUAKE WITH ZERO CASUALTIES
homeCorporate.description: depremTek Market is the official e-commerce affiliate of the Earthquake Technologies project (depremtek.com) under Girişimci Türk. We turn the domestic, innovative disaster solutions developed by engineers into real products, equipping households and institutions with the most resilient gear against expected disasters.

preparedness.title: Earthquake Preparedness & Safety Assistant
preparedness.subtitle: Ask for a preparedness kit or any earthquake-safety question; our AI will help.
preparedness.label: Describe your need or question
preparedness.placeholder: e.g. '3-day kit for a family of 4' or 'How do I secure furniture at home?'
preparedness.surveyTitle: An expert inspection is recommended for your building
preparedness.disclaimer: These answers are general information only. Structural safety can only be determined by a licensed civil engineer's on-site assessment.
preparedness.addError: Something went wrong adding items to the cart.
preparedness.noResults: We couldn't suggest a kit for your needs. Add more detail and try again.
preparedness.disabled: The preparedness assistant is currently unavailable. You can browse products in the store.
preparedness.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

mascot.name: Depremzede
mascot.greeting: Hi! I'm Depremzede 👷 You can find any earthquake-related solution you're looking for right here. So, what are you looking for?

mascot.disclaimer: AI assistant; building safety can only be determined by a licensed engineer's on-site survey.

offline.title: No internet connection
offline.description: You are currently offline. Pages you have already visited remain available, and this page reloads automatically once you are back online.
offline.hint: Tip: Add depremTek Market to your home screen so you can open it without internet during an emergency.

pwa.installBody: Add depremTek Market to your home screen — open it faster and reach it even offline in an emergency.
pwa.iosBody: In Safari, tap the Share button, then choose "Add to Home Screen".
